description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a predominantly brown and black color scheme accented by red stripes and blue highlights. The fuselage is sharply tapered with a cockpit featuring multiple dark, rectangular windows, suggesting a multi-seat, enclosed design. The wings are swept back with pronounced anhedral angles and are equipped with vertical winglets at the tips, as well as visible blue elements on the trailing edges, possibly representing thrusters or lights. Twin vertical stabilizers rise from the rear, flanking a central engine exhaust area, and the tail section is robust with mechanical detailing. The underside of the wings and fuselage show additional structural elements, and the landing gear appears to be fixed and integrated into the main body. The overall design is sleek and aggressive, suitable for rapid maneuvering in urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A sleek, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a multi-window cockpit, finished in brown, black, red, and blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sharply pointed nose, multi-window cockpit, and swept-back wings with red accents and vertical winglets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit windows, and the fixed landing gear integrated into the main body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, central engine exhaust, and blue-highlighted trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the same structural features and fixed landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept-back wings, pronounced anhedral angle, and vertical winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine, visible at the center rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed landing gear integrated into the main body, with visible main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple rectangular windows, suggesting a multi-seat configuration.
